typed: Robust architecture and clear technology decisions
hero.description:
I work on complex challenges, helping to design, evolve, and implement platforms and digital products with technical judgement and long-term vision.
I cover the full cycle: analysis, architecture, technology selection and implementation, ensuring scalable, sustainable and well-crafted solutions.

approachSection.title: Work approach
approachSection.subtitle: How I tackle each context
approachSection.description: I work with judgement, not recipes: I analyse the context, define a clear technical direction, and execute with focus on scalability, sustainability and evolution.

steps.title: Context
steps.desc: I understand the problem, constraints, current operation and objectives before defining a solution.

steps.title: Technical direction
steps.desc: I define architecture, alternatives and technology decisions focusing on clarity, scalability and sustainability.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: I implement with focus on priorities, coordination and real progress.

steps.title: Evolution
steps.desc: I design solutions to be maintainable, scalable and integrable over time without unnecessary complexity.

skillsSection.title: Capabilities
skillsSection.description: I provide technical judgement, direction and execution in contexts where it's necessary to define, organise, modernise or scale digital solutions.

cards.title: Solution architecture
cards.desc: Defining architecture and technical decisions to build clear, sustainable and scalable solutions.

cards.title: Product and platform evolution
cards.desc: Evolving existing products and platforms to support growth, operations and change.

cards.title: Technology modernization
cards.desc: Upgrading platforms, reducing technical debt and preparing for future scalability.

cards.title: Integration and ecosystems
cards.desc: Integrating systems, processes and components that support broader operations.

cards.title: Technical leadership and delivery
cards.desc: Leading technical delivery, aligning definition, implementation and progress with focus on clarity and results.

cards.title: Complex and regional contexts
cards.desc: Working in environments with multiple stakeholders, distributed operations and needs that require judgement, not just recipes.

experienceSection.title: Experience
experienceSection.description: I work in complex corporate environments, combining technical leadership, modernization and team development.

cards.title: Portfolios and regional operations
cards.summary: Portfolios integrated into business ecosystems with regional reach.
cards.description: I have worked on portfolios with regional scope, coordinating continuity, evolution and maintenance within broader business ecosystems.
bullets: Integration with critical business processes and operations
Coordinating regional needs and technical direction
Continuous improvement of platforms in real-world use

cards.title: Modernization and technology evolution
cards.summary: Upgrading platforms to scale with greater robustness.
cards.description: I have driven technology modernization initiatives, renewing components and adopting more sustainable architectures, preparing platforms for growth and greater efficiency.
bullets: Adopting cloud architectures and more sustainable approaches
Preparing for operational growth and efficiency

cards.title: Technical leadership and team development
cards.summary: Teams and technical disciplines aligned with delivery, quality and professional growth.
cards.description: I have led teams and technical disciplines to turn definitions into real progress, combining delivery quality, production support and professional development.
bullets: Coordinating analysis, development, testing and operations
Production support and focus on delivery quality

experienceSection.journeyDescription: Experience developed across projects and organisations in various industries, evolving from technical team leadership to portfolio management, modernization and initiative direction.
experienceSection.baseDescription: Degree in Computer Engineering, complemented by hands-on experience in architecture, delivery and the evolution of products and platforms.

projectsSection.title: Cases
projectsSection.description: A selection of cases where I combined technical judgement, direction and execution to support operations, platforms and highly complex contexts.

cases.title: Commercial platform evolution and regional expansion
cases.summary: Core commercial platforms integrated into critical operations, supporting business changes, high demand and regional expansion.
cases.modalTitle: Commercial platform evolution and regional expansion
cases.modalIntro: Involvement in the evolution of core commercial systems used to manage sales, lines, equipment and services within highly complex technical and functional ecosystems, under strong go-to-market pressure and the need for continuous operation.
cases.context: Business environments where a central platform concentrated end-to-end sales processes, CRM integrations, service activation, billing and multiple satellite systems. In some cases, these platforms also had to support regional expansion into new countries while coexisting with legacy architectures and partial modernizations.
cases.challenge: Maintaining operational continuity on high-demand systems, supporting business transformations with imposed deadlines, and responding to changing requirements, all in contexts where commercial priorities tended to delay technical investments and increase accumulated technical debt.
cases.intervention: I led the technical evolution of these platforms within broader business programs, coordinating requirements, integrations and deployments in complex contexts. I supported regulatory changes, regional rollouts, managed mixed architectures, and helped organize the progressive evolution of solutions that could not afford downtime.
cases.impact: The platforms supported key business changes, maintained large-scale operations, and extended their reach to new regional contexts, even under time pressure, high functional complexity, and a heterogeneous technology base.

cases.title: Operational industrialization and client visibility
cases.summary: An effective but low-visibility operation, transformed into a more predictable, traceable and goal-aligned model.
cases.modalIntro: Intervention in an operation that technically performed well but lacked sufficient planning, documentation and visibility, creating client uncertainty about progress and alignment with their objectives.
cases.context: A team that handled day-to-day needs and performed well operationally, but lacked consistent mechanisms to project work, show progress, anticipate risks, or involve the client early in decisions.
cases.challenge: Generating predictability and trust without slowing the team's responsiveness, providing real visibility into what was being worked on, how much each initiative required, and when concrete results could be expected.
cases.intervention: I implemented a weekly planning scheme with quarterly projections, periodic reporting of hours and status, increased documentation of changes, and early validations with the client. This transformed the workflow into a more transparent, traceable and shared process.
cases.impact: The client gained visibility, predictability and greater peace of mind, alignment with agreed objectives improved, and the team began working within a much more organized framework to uphold commitments, anticipate deviations and resolve issues with less friction.

cases.title: Comprehensive management of a corporate portfolio in LATAM
cases.summary: Multi-application and multi-business portfolio, combining modernization, technical governance, vendors and budget management.
cases.modalTitle: Comprehensive management of a corporate portfolio in LATAM
cases.modalIntro: Leadership over a regional portfolio of applications supporting various corporate domains, in an environment where vendor solutions and custom developments coexist, with demanding global standards and multiple distributed teams.
cases.context: Portfolio of applications from different business areas, with very diverse needs and no clear IT referents on the user side. Additionally, the environment required strict policies on security, accessibility, technology updates, infrastructure and compliance with corporate standards.
cases.challenge: Translating vague needs into concrete requirements, coordinating vendors and internal teams, supporting user functional decisions, executing technical modernizations, and at the same time maintaining control over budget, forecast and annual priorities.
cases.intervention: I managed the portfolio's evolution by combining functional support for users, leading modernization initiatives for code and infrastructure, coordinating with vendors, economic tracking and ongoing alignment with corporate standards and regional objectives.
cases.impact: Portfolio management became clearer, with better alignment between needs and execution, improved technical health of applications, and a stronger foundation to support growth, compliance and continuous evolution initiatives.

servicesSection.title: Services
servicesSection.lead1: I bring technical clarity, align initiatives and support execution
servicesSection.lead2: If you need clarity on an initiative, to prepare a platform for growth, or to navigate a complex environment, let’s talk.

items.title: Unblock and align initiatives
items.description: For contexts where demand, time pressure and ambiguity exist but there’s no clear technical direction to make progress.

items.title: Modernize and prepare for scale
items.description: For platforms that need updates, reduced technical friction and foundations to support sustainable growth.

items.title: Support portfolios, teams and complex landscapes
items.description: For multi-application environments with many stakeholders that require ongoing coordination and governance.

contactSection.title: Let's talk
contactSection.lead: If you have an initiative that needs technical clarity, execution alignment, or a stronger foundation to evolve, write to me.
contactSection.leadDetail: I can support definition phases, platform modernization, technical leadership, or the evolution of portfolios and operations.
